action.reasoning: Observation: The current baseline is valid but poor because it uses TripoSR's default fixed camera orbit instead of the dataset target camera poses. Analysis: We need reproduce TripoSR's rendering path with custom rays from cameras.json; the prior introspection was truncated, so I need the exact TSR.render implementation and any camera-ray helper it calls before editing predict.py. Decision: Run a focused source inspection of TSR.render and relevant callable names only, then implement pose-aware rendering next.
